title: deployed-resources.json
description: Phase 5 Test output: Deployed resource inventory from CloudFormation stack. Produced by /test skill after successful deployment. Consumed by /evidence skill (Phase 7) to synthesize CLI probes with physical resource IDs and ARNs.

region.description: AWS region where stack was deployed

deployed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when stack completed deployment

resources.description: List of deployed resources from CloudFormation describe-stack-resources

_metadata.description: Optional metadata (IaC format used, test environment, etc.)

physical_id.description: AWS physical resource ID (function name, role name, key ID, ARN, etc.). Pattern restricts to characters CFN actually emits: alphanumerics plus '. _ / : = + @ -' — explicitly excludes shell metacharacters (semicolon, ampersand, backtick, pipe, dollar, parens) so that a malicious or malformed physical_id can never be smuggled into a CLI argv. Length capped at 1024 to cover ARNs (max 2048 in service docs but 1024 is enough for first-party CFN resources).

arn.description: Resource ARN if available (not all CFN resources have ARNs)

resource_status.description: CloudFormation resource status at time of capture

controls.description: Control IDs this resource implements (used by F3/F4/F5 synthesis to resolve deployed Config rules / SSM docs / CW alarms back to their authoring control).
